message:
test(raptorq): add G7 replay bundle well-formedness and decision supersession tests

Add two new test functions to the raptorq performance invariants suite:

- g7_expected_loss_contract_replay_bundle_is_well_formed: Validates that
  every replay command in the G7 expected loss contract points to a real
  test function, uses the correct cargo test invocation format, and
  references a test binary that exists in the tests/ directory. Ensures
  the replay bundle stays in sync with actual test infrastructure.

- track_e_decision_supersession_chain_is_well_formed: Validates the
  supersession chain in the Track-E GF256 bench artifact. Checks that
  superseded decisions reference existing ablation IDs, the superseding
  decision has the canonical role, and no decision supersedes itself.
  Prevents broken supersession references from accumulating in the
  decision history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
